---
name: Pack Entry Request
about: Request for a pack to be added to ByteBukkit.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## New Pack Request
What is the name of your pack?
> 

A description for your pack (max 200 letters):
>

What is the type of pack you are requesting? (DLC; Mash-Up, Texture, Skin, ...)
> 

What game version is your pack made for? (All; neoLegacy, Revelations, ...)
> 

On what GitHub Repository is your Pack hosted?
> 

What username should we assign to the pack? (At best your ByteBukkit profile)
> 

Attach a image with a **1:1 Aspect ratio** as your server icon. (Min. 64x64)
